mapper.select: select * from fp_region where tenant_id = #{tenantId} order by created_at desc
select * from fp_region where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}
select * from fp_region where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and env_id = #{envId} and region_code = #{regionCode}
select * from fp_region where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and env_id = #{envId}
select count(1) from fp_region where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and parent_region_id = #{parentRegionId}
mapper.insert: insert into fp_region (id, tenant_id, env_id, parent_region_id, region_type, region_code, region_name, description, created_at, updated_at) values (#{id}, #{tenantId}, #{envId}, #{parentRegionId}, #{regionType}, #{regionCode}, #{regionName}, #{description}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
mapper.delete: delete from fp_region where tenant_id = #{tenantId} and id = #{id}
